DEPT 7/JUDGE TOMAR MASON. REPORTER:MARILYN NORMAN.CLERK:G SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL; DEFT HAVING APPEARED LATE IN DEPT 1. ATNY STEVEN LITTMAN PRESENT WITH PLTF. DEFT BARBARA GASSAMA PRESENT IN PRO-PER. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD; PLTF SUBMITTED PREPARED JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GASSAMA, BARBARA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1906 MISSION STREET #217, SAN FRANCISCO, STAYED UNTIL JAN-02-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT & DMGS. PLTF WILL PAY TO DEFT $200 FOR MOVING EXPENSES IF DEFT VACATES TIMELY, TENDERS KEYS, & LEAVES PREMISES IN BROOM-CLEAN CONDITION. NO HARRASSMENT/ COMMUNICATION BETWEEN DEFT & RESIDENT MGR THROUGH 1-2-96.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
